brand.tagline: Wear your roots with elegance. Handcrafted in Cameroon, delivered across Canada.

hero.title: With Elegance
hero.sub: African-inspired bags, sandals and matching sets — handcrafted in Cameroon with culture, quality and love.

home.storyText: La Fibre Africaine celebrates African heritage through timeless designs and modern elegance. Every piece is handcrafted in Cameroon and tells a story of tradition, craftsmanship and pride — made to be worn every day, everywhere.

product.care: Spot clean with a soft damp cloth. Keep away from prolonged rain. Store stuffed and upright.

about.title: Rooted in Culture, Crafted for Today
about.p1: La Fibre Africaine was born from a simple observation: African families in Canada rarely find products that represent their identity with the elegance it deserves. Cultural fashion was either far away, or it looked like a souvenir.
about.p2: So we went to the source. Every bag and sandal we sell is handcrafted in Cameroon — hand-pieced Ankara patchwork, embroidered toghu velvet from the Grassfields, kente geometry, cowrie shells that were once currency across the continent. Then we bring them to Montréal and ship them across Canada.
about.p3: The name means "the African fibre" — the thread of culture that runs through fabric, through families, and through generations. Our matching sets exist for exactly that reason: a mother and daughter wearing the same cloth, an outfit completed for church or a celebration, a gift that says you belong.
about.quote: People don't simply buy a bag or a sandal. They buy confidence, belonging, memory and identity.
about.v1Text: We honour African culture and craftsmanship with respect. Our pieces are truly made in Cameroon — that story is real, and we tell it proudly.
about.v2Text: Refinement, calm and timeless taste. African prints deserve to be worn at work, at celebrations and in everyday life — with elegance.
about.v3Text: Hand-pieced patchwork, embroidered toghu, cowrie details. We make the artisan's hand visible in every piece.
about.v4Text: We help families pass pride to the next generation — so girls grow up seeing their heritage as beautiful.
about.craftText: We produce in small batches with artisans in Cameroon, which means limited quantities and pieces that are never quite identical. Your order arrives wrapped with the same care it was made with — and when something sells out, a new batch is already on its way.
